summary: Comprehensive testing of Rhino Drishti new features: clickable dashboard stat cards, RSS scan progress bar, and Daily Brief page. All features working correctly. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements functional.

issues: Last scan time shows 'N/A' when no scan has been run yet - this is expected behavior but could show 'No scans yet' for better UX

passed_tests: Dashboard stat cards (Total, Critical, High, Medium, Low) are clickable with cursor pointer and hover effects
Clicking 'Critical' stat card navigates to /feed?severity=critical
Clicking 'High' stat card navigates to /feed?severity=high
Clicking 'Medium' stat card navigates to /feed?severity=medium
Clicking 'Low' stat card navigates to /feed?severity=low
Clicking 'Total Items' stat card navigates to /feed (no filter)
Intelligence Feed correctly filters by severity from URL params
RSS Scanner card visible on dashboard with 'RSS SCANNER' header
RSS Scanner shows progress bar with percentage (e.g., 'Scanning... 100%')
RSS Scanner shows feeds count (e.g., '25/25 feeds')
RSS Scanner shows current source being scanned during active scan
RSS Scanner shows scan log with recently scanned sources
RSS Scanner toggle button (EyeOff icon) hides/shows progress content
GET /api/scan-status returns proper JSON with all required fields
Scan status updates in real-time during active scan
Daily Brief page renders without React error #31 crash
Daily Brief shows Analyst Assessment section
Daily Brief shows NER Key Developments with source links and severity badges
Daily Brief shows State Highlights section
Daily Brief shows Cross-Border Insights section
Dashboard page loads without errors
All navigation links functional
critical_code_review_comments: DailyBrief.js has ESLint warning about missing dependency 'fetchBrief' in useEffect - minor issue, not causing bugs
RSS Scanner 'Last scan' shows 'N/A' when last_scan_at is null - could improve UX with 'No scans yet' message
test_credentials: No credentials needed - app has no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features (clickable stat cards, RSS scan progress bar, Daily Brief fix) are working correctly. The RSS Scanner shows real-time progress during scans. The Daily Brief page is at /daily-brief route (not /brief). Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_new_features.py.
